Collect compatible file groups

Source: R/collect.R
glc_collect.Rd

Explicitly combines file-group tibbles after checking their columns, types, time zones, modalities, roles, and data states.

Usage

glc_collect(x, standardize = c("lightlogr", "none"))

Arguments

x

A collection returned by glc_read().

standardize

Either "lightlogr" to add the conventional Id, participant_Id, Datetime, and file.name columns and remove internal .glc_* provenance columns, or "none" to retain source and provenance columns unchanged.

Value

A combined tibble. In LightLogR-standardized output, Id contains the dataset id, participant_Id contains the participant id, and the result is grouped by Id.

On this page
